# v21.1.1 vs v21.1.0

**Résumé** : 2 ajouté(s), 25 modifié(s), 0 supprimé(s)

## Composants

### Ajoutés (2)

- `data-presentation/stories/angular-basic.md` (10 lignes)
- `data-presentation/stories/html-basic.md` (14 lignes)

### Modifiés (25)

- `box/box.md` (31 → 37 lignes, +6)

  ````diff
  @@ ... @@
   | `killable` | `killable` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | Ajoute un bouton de fermeture. |
   | `withArrow` | `withArrow` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
  +
  +#### Outputs
  +
  +| Property | Binding name | Type |
  +|----------|-------------|------|
  +| `killed` | `killed` | `void` |
   
   ## Related files
  ````
